name: dashboard
description: Local-only Mission Control devtool for the Community SaaS

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n bff,web -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
